TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit SKPaint extends SkiaSharp.SKObject

Docs.summary: Holds the style and color information about how to draw geometries, text and bitmaps.

MemberSignature.Value: public SKPaint ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the default settings.

MemberSignature.Value: public SKPaint (SkiaSharp.SKFont font);
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKFont font) cil managed
public SkiaSharp.SKBlender Blender { get; set; }
.property instance class SkiaSharp.SKBlender Blender

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the custom for compositing.
Docs.value: The custom blender, or to use the default .
Docs.remarks: When set, the blender overrides the property.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKBlendMode BlendMode { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype SkiaSharp.SKBlendMode BlendMode

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the blend mode.
Docs.value: The blend mode used for combining source and destination colors during drawing operations.

public SkiaSharp.SKPaint Clone ();
.method public hidebysig instance class SkiaSharp.SKPaint Clone() cil managed

Docs.summary: Creates a copy of the current paint.
Docs.remarks: The copy is a shallow copy, all references will still point to the same objects.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKColor Color { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColor Color

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the paint's foreground color.
Docs.value: The paint's foreground color as a 32-bit ARGB value.
Docs.remarks: The color is a 32-bit value containing ARGB. This 32-bit value is not premultiplied, meaning that its alpha can be any value, regardless of the values of R, G and B.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKColorF ColorF { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorF ColorF

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the paint's color as an (floating-point RGBA).
Docs.remarks: This property provides higher precision color values than the property.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKColorFilter ColorFilter { get; set; }
.property instance class SkiaSharp.SKColorFilter ColorFilter

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the paint's color filter.
Docs.value: The color filter applied to source colors before drawing, or if no filter is applied.

protected override void Dispose (bool disposing);
.method familyhidebysig virtual instance void Dispose(bool disposing) cil managed

Docs.param: to release both managed and unmanaged resources; to release only unmanaged resources.
Docs.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the and optionally releases the managed resources.
Docs.remarks: Always dispose the object before you release your last reference to the . Otherwise, the resources it is using will not be freed until the garbage collector calls the finalizer.

MemberSignature.Value: protected override void DisposeNative ();
.method familyhidebysig virtual instance void DisposeNative() cil managed

Docs.summary: Implemented by derived types to destroy any native objects.

public SkiaSharp.SKPath GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src);
.method public hidebysig instance class SkiaSharp.SKPath GetFillPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath src) cil managed

Docs.summary: Creates a new path from the result of applying any and all effects to a source path.
Docs.returns: Returns the resulting fill path, or if the source path should be drawn with a hairline.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKPath GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);
.method public hidebysig instance class SkiaSharp.SKPath GetFillPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath src, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix) cil managed

Docs.summary: Creates a new path from the result of applying any and all effects to a source path with a transformation matrix.
Docs.returns: Returns the resulting fill path, or if the source path should be drawn with a hairline.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPath dst);
.method public hidebysig instance bool GetFillPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath src, class SkiaSharp.SKPath dst) cil managed

Docs.summary: Applies any and all effects to a source path, returning the result in the destination.
Docs.returns: if the path should be filled, or false if it should be drawn with a hairline.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst);
.method public hidebysig instance bool GetFillPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath src, class SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst) cil managed
public SkiaSharp.SKPath GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect);
.method public hidebysig instance class SkiaSharp.SKPath GetFillPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath src, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect) cil managed

Docs.param: The limit to be passed to the path effect.
Docs.summary: Creates a new path from the result of applying any and all effects to a source path.
Docs.returns: Returns the resulting fill path, or if the source path should be drawn with a hairline.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKPath GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, float resScale);
.method public hidebysig instance class SkiaSharp.SKPath GetFillPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath src, float32 resScale) cil managed

Docs.param: If > 1, increase precision, else if (0 < res < 1) reduce precision in favor of speed/size.
Docs.summary: Creates a new path from the result of applying any and all effects to a source path.
Docs.returns: Returns the resulting fill path, or if the source path should be drawn with a hairline.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPath dst, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);
.method public hidebysig instance bool GetFillPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath src, class SkiaSharp.SKPath dst, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix) cil managed

Docs.param: The destination path to receive the result.
Docs.summary: Applies any and all effects to a source path with a transformation matrix, writing the result to the destination.
Docs.returns: if the path should be filled; if it should be drawn with a hairline.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPath dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect);
.method public hidebysig instance bool GetFillPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath src, class SkiaSharp.SKPath dst, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect) cil managed

Docs.param: The limit to be passed to the path effect.
Docs.summary: Applies any and all effects to a source path, returning the result in the destination.
Docs.returns: if the path should be filled, or false if it should be drawn with a hairline.

Docs.param: If > 1, increase precision, else if (0 < res < 1) reduce precision in favor of speed/size.
Docs.summary: Applies any and all effects to a source path, returning the result in the destination.
Docs.returns: if the path should be filled, or false if it should be drawn with a hairline.

public SkiaSharp.SKPath GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);
.method public hidebysig instance class SkiaSharp.SKPath GetFillPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath src, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix) cil managed

Docs.param: The culling rectangle to limit the path effect.
Docs.summary: Creates a new path from the result of applying effects to a source path with culling and transformation.
Docs.returns: Returns the resulting fill path, or if the source path should be drawn with a hairline.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKPath GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, float resScale);
.method public hidebysig instance class SkiaSharp.SKPath GetFillPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath src, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, float32 resScale) cil managed

Docs.param: The limit to be passed to the path effect.
If > 1, increase precision, else if (0 < res < 1) reduce precision in favor of speed/size.
Docs.summary: Creates a new path from the result of applying any and all effects to a source path.
Docs.returns: Returns the resulting fill path, or if the source path should be drawn with a hairline.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPath dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);
.method public hidebysig instance bool GetFillPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath src, class SkiaSharp.SKPath dst, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix) cil managed

Docs.param: The destination path to receive the result.
The culling rectangle to limit the path effect.
Docs.summary: Applies any and all effects to a source path with culling and transformation, writing the result to the destination.
Docs.returns: if the path should be filled; if it should be drawn with a hairline.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPath dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, float resScale);
.method public hidebysig instance bool GetFillPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath src, class SkiaSharp.SKPath dst, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, float32 resScale) cil managed

Docs.param: The destination path may be culled to this rectangle.
If > 1, increase precision, else if (0 < res < 1) reduce precision in favor of speed/size.
Docs.summary: Applies any and all effects to a source path, returning the result in the destination.
Docs.returns: if the path should be filled, or false if it should be drawn with a hairline.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);

.method public hidebysig instance bool GetFillPath(class SkiaSharp.SKPath src, class SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, float32 resScale) cil managed

.property instance class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter ImageFilter

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the image filter.
Docs.value: The image filter, or if none is set.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool IsAntialias { get; set; }
.property instance bool IsAntialias

Docs.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether anti-aliasing is enabled.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool IsAutohinted { get; set; }
.property instance bool IsAutohinted
public bool IsDither { get; set; }
.property instance bool IsDither

Docs.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether dithering is enabled.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool IsEmbeddedBitmapText { get; set; }
.property instance bool IsEmbeddedBitmapText
public bool IsLinearText { get; set; }
.property instance bool IsLinearText
public bool IsStroke { get; set; }
.property instance bool IsStroke

Docs.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to paint a stroke or the fill.
Docs.remarks: This is a shortcut way to set to either or .

MemberSignature.Value: public bool LcdRenderText { get; set; }
.property instance bool LcdRenderText
public SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter MaskFilter { get; set; }
.property instance class SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter MaskFilter

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the mask filter to use when painting.
Docs.value: The mask filter, or if none is set.
Docs.remarks: Mask filters control the transformations on the alpha channel before primitives are drawn. Examples are blur or emboss.

public SkiaSharp.SKPathEffect PathEffect { get; set; }
.property instance class SkiaSharp.SKPathEffect PathEffect

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the path effect to use when painting.
Docs.value: The path effect, or if none is set.

MemberSignature.Value: public void Reset ();
.method public hidebysig instance void Reset() cil managed

Docs.summary: Resets all the paint properties to their defaults.

MemberSignature.Value: public void SetColor (SkiaSharp.SKColorF color, SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace colorspace);
.method public hidebysig instance void SetColor(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorF color, class SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace colorspace) cil managed

Docs.summary: Sets the paint's color using a floating-point color value in the specified color space.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKShader Shader { get; set; }
.property instance class SkiaSharp.SKShader Shader

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the shader to use when painting.
Docs.value: The shader, or if none is set.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKStrokeCap StrokeCap { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype SkiaSharp.SKStrokeCap StrokeCap

Docs.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating how the start and end of stroked lines and paths are treated.
Docs.value: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the start and end of stroked lines and paths are treated.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKStrokeJoin StrokeJoin { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype SkiaSharp.SKStrokeJoin StrokeJoin

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the path's join type.
Docs.value: One of the enumeration values that specifies the join type.

MemberSignature.Value: public float StrokeMiter { get; set; }
.property instance float32 StrokeMiter

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the paint's miter limit.
Docs.remarks: This is used whenever the is or to control the behavior of miter joins when the joins' angle is sharp.

MemberSignature.Value: public float StrokeWidth { get; set; }
.property instance float32 StrokeWidth

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the paint's stroke width.
Docs.remarks: This is used whenever the is or . The value of zero is the special hairline mode. Hairlines always draw with a width of 1 pixel, regardless of the transformation matrix.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKPaintStyle Style { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPaintStyle Style

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the painting style.
Docs.value: One of the enumeration values that specifies the painting style.

.property instance bool SubpixelText
